TC-S5-013-01.description: Load case context, verify requiredDocuments array has 10+ entries

TC-S5-013-02.description: Verify each required document has criticality field ('critical' or 'optional')

TC-S5-013-03.description: Verify regulations array contains at least 5 regulation references

TC-S5-013-04.description: Each regulation has reference, title, url, and summary fields

TC-S5-013-05.description: Verify commonIssues array contains at least 10 common issues with solutions

TC-S5-013-06.description: Verify processingInfo includes timeline, costs, and contact information

TC-S5-013-07.description: Ask AI 'What documents are required?', verify AI lists documents from enhanced context

TC-S5-013-08.description: Ask AI about specific regulation, verify AI cites regulation reference from context

TC-S5-013-09.description: Validation report references regulation when document missing

TC-S5-013-10.description: Context schema version is tracked in case.json (schemaVersion field)

TC-S5-013-11.description: Research sources documented in researchSources array

TC-S5-013-12.description: Validate context against schema, verify all required fields present

TC-S5-013-13.description: Alternative documents listed for critical requirements (e.g., passport alternatives)

TC-S5-013-14.description: Document specifications include validity period and format requirements
